---
title: "YourPackage.jl"
description: "One sentence on what the package does."
categories: [distributions]
status: experimental
---

<!--
Copy this file to packages/<yourpackage>.qmd to add a package to the site.
Delete these comments. Keep the front matter fields above:
  title        the package name (shown on the card and page)
  description  one sentence (shown on the card)
  categories   one or more topical tags (shown as chips, drive filtering)
  status       maturity of the package, set from its release cycle (not judgement):
                 experimental  real code, no registered release yet (install from GitHub)
                 maturing      registered and Pkg.add-able, on a 0.x line
                 stable        a 1.0+ release with a committed, semver API
               Repositories with no real, documented functionality are shell repos:
               leave them off the site entirely and track them on the org profile.
-->

A short paragraph on what the package is for and how it fits the ecosystem.

## Install

```julia
using Pkg
Pkg.add("YourPackage")
```

## Links

- [Documentation ↗](https://yourpackage.epiaware.org/) <!-- the package's own docs site -->
- [GitHub](https://github.com/EpiAware/YourPackage.jl)
